title: plan.contract.approved.v1 payload
description: Payload of the plan.contract.approved.v1 event — notification-only projection of an ApprovalDecision. Per ADR-0003, plan-contract-service signals Temporal directly on approval; this event is a downstream notification, not the authority path itself.
$comment: compat_class: open (event payload, ADR-0012/ADR-0024). Authority: approved plan §2 event row (docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2, §5 'event/ 6종', deliverable 4); domain/approval-decision/v1 (contract_hash/decision field shapes). ADR-0024(e)-2 BAN (Security critic MUST-FIX, ruling R9-3): this payload deliberately EXCLUDES approver_actor_id — approver identity is PII-sensitive and MUST NOT be embedded in the event payload; it is discoverable only by dereferencing contract_hash against the domain/approval-decision system-of-record (RBAC-gated, per k3s §4.1 payload PII/secret ban and ADR-0024(e)-2). The full per-approver record (approver_actor_id, patch_unit_decisions, signature, decided_at) lives exclusively in domain/approval-decision/v1 — the ledger/authority artifact for approval decisions is that contract, not this event. NO additionalProperties:false (open class).

contract_hash.$comment: References the ChangePlan instance this decision resolves — same carrier role as domain/approval-decision.contract_hash. Consumers dereference this hash against domain/approval-decision (RBAC-gated) to obtain approver identity, per-patch-unit decisions, and signature — none of which are re-projected here (ADR-0024(e)-2).
